name: paideia
description: Exam-prep workspace for math/physics courses, Codex-native. 14 skills (one per verb) + one bundled stdio MCP server (paideia-mcp) that owns the heavy logic: parallel vision ingest of course PDFs (codex-native via Codex CLI's bundled vision — no extra API key / Qwen3-VL / Tesseract), strategy-grading of hand-written answer PDFs, course-index extraction, and artifact-derived phase detection. Drop lecture/textbook/HW/solution PDFs into materials/, and the plugin builds a per-course knowledge graph — patterns ranked by HW-density exam tier, drills, weakmaps, cheatsheets — all as plain markdown in your course folder.
